task_completion.description: Set the grading method to 'Marking guide'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the assignment settings under 'Grade', the 'Grading method' dropdown is set to 'Marking guide', or the Advanced Grading page shows 'Marking guide' as the active method.

task_completion.description: Name the marking guide 'Research Paper Standard Guide'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field in the marking guide creation form contains 'Research Paper Standard Guide'.
A criterion is named 'Historical Argument' with a maximum score of 40. The 'Description for Markers' field contains text mentioning 'synthesis of at least 3 sources'.
A criterion is named 'Critical Analysis' with a maximum score of 40. The 'Description for Markers' field contains text mentioning 'social changes to economic drivers'.
A criterion is named 'Turabian Formatting' with a maximum score of 20. The 'Description for Markers' field contains text mentioning 'hanging indents'.

task_completion.description: Add the two specified frequently used comments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Frequently used comments' section has entries for 'Excellent integration of primary sources.' and 'Please review the Turabian citation style guide.'

task_completion.description: Save the marking guide and make it ready for use.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save marking guide and make it ready' button, or the final screen shows the marking guide is active and ready for use.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Moodle web interface to configure the assignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Moodle web interface being used, with form fields being filled out in the browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database administration tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) are used to insert the marking guide data.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed or pasted the required text into the Moodle form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text present in the appropriate input fields on the Moodle marking guide configuration page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a Marking Guide for the 'Industrial Revolution Research Paper' assignment in the HIST201 course. The grading method must be set to 'guide'. The guide must be named 'Research Paper Standard Guide'. It must have 3 criteria: 'Historical Argument' (Max score: 40, marker description contains 'synthesis of at least 3 sources'), 'Critical Analysis' (Max score: 40, marker description contains 'social changes to economic drivers'), and 'Turabian Formatting' (Max score: 20, marker description contains 'hanging indents'). It must also have 2 frequently used comments: 'Excellent integration of primary sources.' and 'Please review the Turabian citation style guide.'. The guide must be saved and made ready for use (status 20).
